zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Stradling於1423年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根聖 堂納次時，她的父親Sir Edward Stradling25歲，母親Jane Beaufort21歲。她於1437年11月1日之前與Maurice Dennys在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾奧爾維斯頓，埋葬在威爾士格拉莫爾根考布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Stradling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Strättlingen near Thun in Switzerland. The English landed family bearing this name, with a seat at Saint Donats (Glamorgan), traces its origins to John de Estratlinges (died c. 1293), who came to England from Switzerland with Otto de Grandison, Edward I's companion-in-arms.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Stradling was born in 1423, in St Donats, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Edward Stradling, was 25 and her mother, Jane Beaufort, was 21. She married Maurice Dennys before 1 November 1437, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Cowbridge, Glamorgan, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Stradling est née en 1423, à St Donats, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edward Stradling, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jane Beaufort, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Maurice Dennys avant 1 novembre 1437, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée à Olveston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Cowbridge, Glamorgan, Galles.

November 1437 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Maurice Dennys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cowbridge, Glamorgan, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Stradling è nata il nel 1423 nel St Donats, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Edward Stradling, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jane Beaufort, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Maurice Dennys prima del 1 novembre 1437, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Cowbridge, Glamorgan, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Stradlingが1423年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンスト ドナツで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Stradlingは25歳，母Jane Beaufortは21歳であった。1437年11月1日以前にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでMaurice Dennysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアオルベストンで死去し，ウェールズグラモーガンコウブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Stradling(이)가 1423년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 스트 도냇스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Stradling(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Beaufort(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1437년 11월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Maurice Dennys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 베스턴에서 사망했으며 웨일스 글램르건 코우브리지에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Maurice Dennys antes 1 de novembro de 1437, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Stradling родилась в 1423 г. в местности ст донац, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Stradling было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Beaufort, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maurice Dennys перед 1 ноябрь 1437 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в местности олвестон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности коубридж, глэморган, Уэльс.

Se casó con Maurice Dennys antes de 1 de noviembre de 1437, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos.
